name: tablecam
description: Floating camera desktop app with settings panel and transparent float window.
author: TableCam

scripts.desktop: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron .
scripts.build:electron: tsc public/*.ts --outDir public --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --module commonjs --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node
scripts.make: npm run build:release && npm run build:electron && electron-forge make
scripts.make:zip: npm run build:release && npm run build:electron && electron-forge make --targets @electron-forge/maker-zip
scripts.package: npm run build:release && npm run build:electron && electron-forge package
